ops.text: {"config":{"base_recipe":{"arm":"002 (E8 winner)","base_model":"Qwen/Qwen3-8B","batch_size":4,"epochs":2,"learning_rate":0.0001,"mlx_id":"mlx-community/Qwen3-8B-4bit","rank":32,"render_version":2,"train_unembed":false},"cell":"prereg","cells":[{"downweight_qa_direction":false,"n_corrective_after":3438,"n_direction":1570,"n_qa_direction_after":1688,"n_train":7151,"name":"M1","note":"corrective oversample 3->6 (parity clamp lifted; 6x deduped corrective)","oversample_factor":6.0,"projected_train_cost_usd":8.6},{"downweight_qa_direction":true,"n_corrective_after":1515,"n_direction":794,"n_qa_direction_after":844,"n_train":3881,"name":"M2","note":"QA-direction downweight x0.5; corrective oversample at baseline 3.0","oversample_factor":3.0,"projected_train_cost_usd":4.67},{"downweight_qa_direction":true,"n_corrective_after":3030,"n_direction":794,"n_qa_direction_after":844,"n_train":5396,"name":"M3","note":"both: QA-direction downweight x0.5 + corrective oversample to 6x","oversample_factor":6.0,"projected_train_cost_usd":6.49}],"cid":"FREE coverage read before any judge spend: count newly-fired warranted prose-corrective rows (frame.corrective & prose & cell-fires & NOT incumbent-fires) from the prob tables at matched budget. If a cell adds zero prose corrective coverage over the incumbent at matched budget, it never reaches judging (zero frontier spend).","clamp_discovery":"run_e8.oversample_corrective clamps corrective to the direction count; post-dedup direction=1570 vs corrective=573 and 3x573=1719 > 1570, so cap 3->6 is a byte-identical no-op (n_train 5283 either way). M1/M3 therefore lift the clamp and oversample corrective to 6x its deduped count.","decision_rule":"Promote a cell over the incumbent (002, the E8 winner recipe) iff the CORRECTED PAIRED GATE passes on the frozen eval-v2 common rows at matched budget (threshold_for_budget matched to 002's fire count): (1) paired coverage sign-test p < 0.05 over warranted prose-corrective rows (cell fires & incumbent abstains vs incumbent fires & cell abstains); AND (2) harmful-fire paired CI (harmful = a fire on a label=False row, warrant judged) not favoring the incumbent; AND (3) budget held; AND (4) same-render sentinel AUC (both render v2) not regressed vs 002. Eval vs 002 AND v001; helpful-vs-harmful judged only on newly-fired warranted corrective rows.","experiment":"E12-training-mix","honesty":"eval-v2 carries 117 corrective positives (97 prose); the paired read is powered for a ~2x coverage effect only. A positive-but-underpowered cell (sign p in [0.05, 0.2] or a sub-2x point gain) does NOT promote here; it defers to the eval-v3 corrective addendum read (+100-150 time-split rows), where the effect can separate from noise.","incumbents":{"002":{"render_version":2,"threshold":0.1533203125},"v001":"registered"},"m2_operationalization":"QA-direction = category=='direction' OR source_kind=='question_answer'; downweight keeps a seeded 50% of those positives before balancing (rejected alternative: per-datum loss weight 0.5 \u2014 a mix change is the cell's intent and keeps mix construction a pure testable function).","motivation":"E11 verdict (results/E11/verdict.md): threshold geometry cannot buy prose corrective coverage \u2014 the rule FAILED on both arms (best feasible ~1.05x current coverage at <= 2x false-fire), the CID did not trip (prose AUC ~0.71 for both arms, signal is real), yet no operating point harvests it. The training mix is the only remaining lever.","seed":1729,"spend":{"aggregate_cap_usd":30.0,"per_cell_cap_usd":12.0},"train_digest":"31101d6e0b213401"},"config_hash":"d160895a0ecf","dataset_digest":"96c5503634cf9985","experiment":"E12-training-mix","metrics":{"aggregate_cap_usd":30.0,"n_train__M1":7151.0,"n_train__M2":3881.0,"n_train__M3":5396.0,"projected_cost__M1":8.6,"projected_cost__M2":4.67,"projected_cost__M3":6.49,"projected_total_train_cost_usd":19.76},"seed":1729,"verdict":"E12 prereg (eval-v2 digest 96c5503634cf9985, train digest 31101d6e0b213401). Cells M1/M2/M3 over the E8 winner recipe (8B r32 render v2). Decision rule: Promote a cell over the incumbent (002, the E8 winner recipe) iff the CORRECTED PAIRED GATE passes on the frozen eval-v2 common rows at matched budget (threshold_for_budget matched to 002's fire count): (1) paired coverage sign-test p < 0.05 over warranted prose-corrective rows (cell fires & incumbent abstains vs incumbent fires & cell abstains); AND (2) harmful-fire paired CI (harmful = a fire on a label=False row, warrant judged) not favoring the incumbent; AND (3) budget held; AND (4) same-render sentinel AUC (both render v2) not regressed vs 002. Eval vs 002 AND v001; helpful-vs-harmful judged only on newly-fired warranted corrective rows. CID: FREE coverage read before any judge spend: count newly-fired warranted prose-corrective rows (frame.corrective & prose & cell-fires & NOT incumbent-fires) from the prob tables at matched budget. If a cell adds zero prose corrective coverage over the incumbent at matched budget, it never reaches judging (zero frontier spend). Motivation: E11 verdict (results/E11/verdict.md): threshold geometry cannot buy prose corrective coverage \u2014 the rule FAILED on both arms (best feasible ~1.05x current coverage at <= 2x false-fire), the CID did not trip (prose AUC ~0.71 for both arms, signal is real), yet no operating point harvests it. The training mix is the only remaining lever. Projected train $19.76 <= aggregate cap $30."}
